title: 安田記念の後に・俺流アクセルon！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Vodka's dash pay off is a much bigger
reward than the victory itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having obtained a powerful edge, Vodka smiles,
feeling that she can't lose to anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her powerful, ultra cool new weapon, Vodka
decides to run in the autumn Tenno Sho against
her biggest rival, Daiwa Scarlet!
